description: Yet, just another blog encrypt plugin for hexo.
name: hexo-blog-encrypt

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:server && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:server: node tests/helpers/install-fixture.js && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --include=index.js --include=src/server/**/*.js --check-coverage --lines=100 --functions=100 --branches=100 --statements=100 node --test tests/server/*.test.js tests/docs.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: cd tests/fixtures/hexo-site && (test -d node_modules || npm install --no-audit --no-fund) && cd ../../.. && playwright install --with-deps chromium && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js
